base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_score_digits — a ui (hud_readout) from 1980 pac man. 0-9 score digits in white palette — rendered at top HUD '1UP / HIGH SCORE / 2UP' labels. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 0-9 score digits in white palette — rendered at top HUD '1UP / HIGH SCORE / 2UP' labels; same 8×8 glyphs as text sheet but isolated here for HUD rendering
